name: Pumpkin Muffins- WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup pumpkin, 1 teaspoon baking powder, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, 4 tablespoons raisins, 2 eggs, ½ cup grated carrots, 1 teaspoon vanilla, ⅔ cup powdered milk, 6 tablespoons flour, and 2 teaspoons pumpkin pie spice.
2. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
3. Spray a muffin tin with Pam cooking spray.
4. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
6. Makes 12 muffins.
Each serving of six (6) muffins equals the following WW Exchanges: 1 Bread, 1 Fruit, 1 Milk, 1 Protein, and 1½ Vegetables. This is a no-fat recipe! You may substitute Egg Beaters for the eggs and Equal for the Sweet & Low. Freezes well.
